name: Veeva CRM Life Sciences API
what_it_does: Veeva CRM REST API for pharmaceutical and life sciences commercial CRM platform. Enables AI agents to manage HCP (Healthcare Professional) and HCO (Healthcare Organization) account data, access medical sales rep call and activity records, retrieve sample and marketing materials distribution data, handle medical affairs interaction data, access speaker program and medical education data, manage Sunshine Act reporting and HCP spend data, integrate with CLM (Closed Loop Marketing) content, and connect commercial data with clinical and regulatory systems.
use_cases: Accessing HCP account and engagement data from pharma field force automation agents
Retrieving sales rep call activity and territory data from commercial analytics agents
Managing HCP spend and Sunshine Act reporting from compliance agents
Integrating clinical trial investigator data from medical affairs coordination agents
not_for: Non-life sciences CRM without pharma-specific HCP and compliance workflows
General sales CRM without Sunshine Act and pharmaceutical compliance requirements
Consumer-facing businesses without healthcare professional targeting
best_when: A pharmaceutical company, biotech, or medical device manufacturer using Veeva CRM wants AI agents to automate field force operations, HCP engagement analytics, compliance reporting, and commercial insights.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+HIPAA: HCP data and pharma commercial interactions are subject to Sunshine Act disclosure. PHI may be present in clinical data. Off-label promotion regulations (FDA 21 CFR) strictly limit what can be communicated to HCPs. Automated HCP outreach must comply with pharmaceutical marketing regulations.

auth.notes: Veeva uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with commercial, medical, and compliance scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Veeva Vault API separate from Veeva CRM API. Multi-product platform with separate API surfaces per product.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — life sciences enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and per-module enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Pleasanton, California. NYSE: VEEV. Founded 2007. Dominant life sciences CRM. Used by 1,000+ life sciences companies. 20+ of the top 20 pharma companies use Veeva. Market cap $30B+. Veeva Vault is their content management platform. Competes with Salesforce Life Sciences for commercial CRM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: HCP spend data is subject to Sunshine Act mandatory disclosure — automation must be accurate
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Off-label promotion regulations — automated HCP communications must comply with FDA marketing rules
21 CFR Part 11 electronic records compliance — audit trails for clinical and regulatory data required
Veeva CRM and Veeva Vault are separate products with separate APIs — don't conflate
GxP validation requirements — changes to automated workflows may require formal validation documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pharma commercial and HCP data. SOC2, GxP, 21 CFR Part 11, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Sunshine Act compliance. FDA marketing regulations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pharma HCP data. SOC2, GxP, 21 CFR Part 11, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Sunshine Act and FDA compliance.
